description_long: This is a whimsical, pointed witch hat with a wide, circular brim and a tall, conical crown that curves slightly to one side. The hat is predominantly a rich purple color, giving it a magical and eye-catching appearance. Around the base of the crown is a pale, off-white band, fastened with a small, gold buckle and adorned with a delicate pink bow on one side. The brim is broad and flat, providing ample shade and a dramatic silhouette. The surface of the hat appears to be made from a soft, felt-like material, with a subtle matte finish. The overall design is playful and elegant, suitable for costume or festive urban events.
description: A tall, purple witch hat with a wide brim, white band, and pink bow, featuring a curved, pointed crown and a soft, matte texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed crown, wide brim, and the white band with a gold buckle and a hint of the pink bow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curve of the crown and the full pink bow on the white band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dramatic backward curve of the crown and the continuous white band around the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elongated, curved tip of the crown and the uninterrupted brim.
attribute_crown_shape: tall and conical with a curved, pointed tip
